summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Site Settings, Newsletter Scheduling, and Bug Reports. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/site-settings returns default settings (brand_name, subtitle, primary_color, accent_color)
PUT /api/admin/site-settings updates brand_name
PUT /api/admin/site-settings updates subtitle
PUT /api/admin/site-settings updates primary_color and accent_color
POST /api/admin/newsletters without scheduled_at sends immediately (status=sent)
POST /api/admin/newsletters with scheduled_at creates scheduled newsletter (status=scheduled)
DELETE /api/admin/newsletters/{id} deletes a newsletter
GET /api/admin/newsletters returns list with status, scheduled_at, sent_at fields
POST /api/bug-reports creates a bug report with title, description, priority
GET /api/bug-reports returns user's own bug reports
GET /api/admin/bug-reports returns all bug reports for admin
PUT /api/admin/bug-reports/{id} updates status and admin_note
POST /api/bug-reports with screenshot stores base64 image
GET /api/admin/bug-reports/{id}/screenshot returns screenshot data
Non-admin users get 403 on PUT /api/admin/site-settings
Admin Panel page has 6 tabs: Utenti, Sito, Newsletter, Segnalazioni, Email Log, Inviate
Site Settings tab shows brand name, subtitle, color pickers with preview and save button
Newsletter tab has schedule toggle with date/time picker
Bug Report page (/bug-report) accessible from sidebar with form (title, description, priority, screenshot upload)
Bug Report page shows user's previous reports with status badges
Admin Segnalazioni tab shows all reports with status dropdown and admin note field
Sidebar shows 'Segnala Problema' link for all users
Site settings brand_name appears in sidebar header
seed_data_creation: Created test bug reports and newsletters during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully implemented and tested: 1) Site Settings - admin can change brand_name, subtitle, primary_color, accent_color via PUT /api/admin/site-settings. Colors are applied dynamically via CSS variables. 2) Newsletter Scheduling - POST /api/admin/newsletters with scheduled_at creates scheduled newsletter (status=scheduled). Background asyncio task checks every 60 seconds for newsletters past their scheduled_at time. 3) Bug Reports - users submit via POST /api/bug-reports with optional base64 screenshot. Admin manages via GET/PUT /api/admin/bug-reports. Status values: aperto, in_lavorazione, risolto.

site_settings.api_get: GET /api/site-settings - returns brand_name, subtitle, primary_color, accent_color
site_settings.api_update: PUT /api/admin/site-settings - updates any combination of settings
site_settings.ui_tab: Admin Panel > Sito tab with form fields and color pickers
site_settings.preview: Live preview of brand name and colors before saving
site_settings.sidebar_integration: Brand name appears in sidebar header dynamically

newsletter_scheduling.scheduled_send: POST with scheduled_at creates scheduled newsletter (status=scheduled)
newsletter_scheduling.scheduler: Background asyncio task runs every 60 seconds to send scheduled newsletters
newsletter_scheduling.ui_toggle: Checkbox 'Programma invio' shows date/time pickers when checked

bug_reports.user_create: POST /api/bug-reports with title, description, priority, optional screenshot
bug_reports.admin_list: GET /api/admin/bug-reports returns all reports with user info
bug_reports.ui_page: /bug-report page with form and previous reports list
bug_reports.sidebar_link: 'Segnala Problema' link visible to all users

mocked_apis.email_sending: REAL - SMTP configured with Aruba (smtps.aruba.it). Emails are actually sent.
